ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the research study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date study commenced */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date study concluded */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the research */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "study_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., experimental, observational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical test */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study this test belongs to */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the statistical test */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term related to the statistical analysis */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Type of statistic reported (e.g., p-value) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the statistical analysis */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "preregistered" TEXT /* Indicates if the test was preregistered */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the statistical test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_tests_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable measured */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study this variable is part of */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., categorical, continuous) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "variable_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study this author contributed to */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the study (e.g., principal investigator, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_authors_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement method */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study this method is used in */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the measurement method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_methods_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study this funding is associated with */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was granted */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number assigned by the funding agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel, PDF) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study the report is based on */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings presented in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., preliminary, final, updated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study this indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_indicators_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_limitations" (
  "limitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limitation */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study this limitation belongs to */,
  "limitation_description" TEXT /* Description of the limitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_limitations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)
